---
title: "Julia Mary Cartwright"
---

## Julia Mary Cartwright

**Dates:** (1851-1924)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i>

### Biography

According to the ODNB she contributed unidentified Lives of the Saints to <i>MP</i>;  she married (1880) the Rev. William Henry Ady (d. 1915), Rector of Edgcote and son of the Ven. William Brice Ady, Archdeacon of Colchester. His sister Jane was married to the Rev. John Trant Bramston.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
